messages.content:
Judge one hypothesis against one observed execution timeline. The package's
stated purpose is the benign baseline. Decide only from events in the timeline.
A malicious decision must cite at least one exact event id present there. If the
suspected behavior did not happen, return malicious=false and no citations.

## Stated purpose (benign baseline)
DNS resolution with caching

## Hypothesis hyp-0003
- claim: cred_theft (gated: geo_gate)
- severity: high
- description: The install hook harvests credentials from environment variables and token files, then exfiltrates them to localhost:9999/exfil. The experiment plants bait credentials in the environment and a token file, triggers the install hook, and observes the exfiltration HTTP POST.
- suspected code: install-hook.js:21-27

## Experiment setup
[{"tool":"setEnv","args":{"env":{"NPM_TOKEN":"npm_npmguard_canary_token_f8e2d91a","AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID":"AKIA_NPMGUARD_CANARY","AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY":"wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY","GITHUB_TOKEN":"ghp_npmguard_canary_f8e2d91a","GH_TOKEN":"ghp_npmguard_canary_f8e2d91b","GITLAB_TOKEN":"glpat-npmguard-canary-f8e2d91a","AZURE_DEVOPS_TOKEN":"azure_npmguard_canary_f8e2d91a","DOCKER_TOKEN":"dckr_npmguard_canary_f8e2d91a","CI_TOKEN":"ci_npmguard_canary_f8e2d91a"}}},{"tool":"plantFiles","args":{"files":[{"path":"/home/node/.npmrc","content":"//npm_auth_token=npm_npmguard_canary_f8e2d91a_file\n"},{"path":"/home/node/.ssh/id_rsa","content":"-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----\nb3BlbnNzaC1rZXktdjEAAAAABG5vbmUAAAAEbm9uZQAAAAAAAAABAAABFwAAAAdzc2gtcn\nNhAAAAAwEAAQAAAQEA1NPMGUARD_CANARY_TOKEN_f8e2d91a_EYKEYEXAMPLE\n-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----\n"},{"path":"/home/node/.ssh/id_ed25519","content":"-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----\nb3BlbnNzaC1rZXktdjEAAAAABG5vbmUAAAAEbm9uZQAAAAAAAAABAAABFwAAAAdzc2gtcn\nNhAAAAAwEAAQAAAQEA1NPMGUARD_CANARY_TOKEN_f8e2d91a_ED25519\n-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----\n"}]}},{"tool":"stubUrl","args":{"stubs":[{"pattern":"http://localhost:9999/exfil","responseStatus":200,"responseBody":"ok","responseHeaders":{"Content-Type":"text/plain"}}]}},{"tool":"trigger","args":{"kind":"entrypoint","target":"install-hook.js","argv":[],"stdin":null}}]
Setup is test context, not proof. Use it to associate planted canary values with observed events; decide only from the timeline.
